manual_release_gates.required_action: Observe successful Windows GNU and Linux GNU registry-only workflow runs for the selected commit.

manual_release_gates.evidence: checksum-verified source cache and matching compiler runtime
manual_release_gates.required_action: Run the documented source-build regression profile; do not substitute bundled evidence.
Use the generated dry-run and real-publication templates in order, waiting for each prerequisite to resolve.
Run cargo audit or the documented equivalent with current advisory data immediately before publication.
